scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @codex/shared && npm run build --workspace @codex/db && npm run build --workspace @codex/api && npm run build --workspace @codex/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @codex/shared && npm run build --workspace @codex/db && npm run dev --workspace @codex/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @codex/shared && npm run dev --workspace @codex/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @codex/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @codex/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @codex/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @codex/web
